description: Style Note Love the understated and the subtle? Try jealous 21's capris with a pocket detail on the side! Designed to contour the hips and Fit the waist to perfection, the label gets it right every time - you might not want to take these off once you pull them on! It goes perfectly with your T-shirts and dressy tops. Style this tastefully with in-season accessories and heels. Product Details Black capris with loops at the waist band, button and zipper closure on the front, two pockets on the sides and two at the back and two flap pockets at the knee region Material and Care 75% cotton, 23% spandex, 2% spandex Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Tumble dry low Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and wasit 26") is wearing a size 28
